---
title: "Projects"
pagetitle: "Research · Mahshad Sarikhani"
subtitle: "Tools, models, and research software"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
  categories: true
toc: false
---

Research software and tools built at the intersection of clinical imaging, IBD, and applied AI. Some are deployed and in active use; others are experiments that earned their place by teaching something useful. Each project page describes the problem, the design decisions, and where things stand now.
